nasb.text: Therefore, I will take back My grain at harvest time And My new wine in its season. I will also take away My wool and My flax Given to cover her nakedness.

esv.text: Therefore I will take back my grain in its time, and my wine in its season, and I will take away my wool and my flax, which were to cover her nakedness.

cnv.text: 因此，到了收割的時候， 到了出酒的季節， 我必收回五穀和新酒； 用來給她遮蔽裸體的羊毛和麻布， 我也必奪回。

ccb.text: 因此，到了收割和酿酒的季节， 我要收走我的五谷和新酒， 夺回我给她遮体的羊毛和麻布。
